dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The world ended.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Ten years. Ten long years trapped within the Shadow Labyrinth. We fought, we bled, we sacrificed everything to clear the final stage.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: But in the end, it was all for naught. The Labyrinth consumed us, and then, the world.

dialogue.speaker: Desir Arman
dialogue.line: Gasp...!

dialogue.speaker: Desir Arman
dialogue.line: (My head... it's pounding. What is this place?)

dialogue.speaker: Desir Arman
dialogue.line: The ceiling... it's intact. The walls... not crumbling. This isn't the Labyrinth. This isn't the ruined world.

dialogue.speaker: Desir Arman
dialogue.line: A bed? A proper bed? I haven't slept in one of these in a decade.

dialogue.speaker: Desir Arman
dialogue.line: (My hands... they're small. My body... it's young.)

dialogue.speaker: Desir Arman
dialogue.line: No, this can't be... Is this a dream? A hallucination before death?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He rushed to a nearby mirror, his heart hammering against his ribs. Reflected back was the face of his sixteen-year-old self.

dialogue.speaker: Desir Arman
dialogue.line: It's real. I'm back. I've returned to the past.

dialogue.speaker: Desir Arman
dialogue.line: The day before Hebrion Academy's entrance ceremony. The day before everything began.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The memories of the Shadow Labyrinth, the faces of his comrades who fell one by one, the despair of the final battle—they were all vivid, excruciatingly clear.

dialogue.speaker: Desir Arman
dialogue.line: (Romantica, Pram, Azest... everyone. You won't have to die this time.)

dialogue.speaker: Desir Arman
dialogue.line: (I'll change it. I'll prevent the Shadow Labyrinth from ever consuming the world.)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The next morning, the grand gates of Hebrion Academy stood before him, just as they had ten years ago. But this time, his gaze was different.

dialogue.speaker: Instructor
dialogue.line: Welcome, new students, to Hebrion Academy! The pinnacle of magic education on the continent!

dialogue.speaker: Instructor
dialogue.line: Today, you will undergo a basic aptitude test. This will determine your initial class placement: Alpha or Beta.

dialogue.speaker: Desir Arman
dialogue.line: (Alpha Class. That's where the future heroes are. The ones who will stand at the forefront against the Shadow Labyrinth.)

dialogue.speaker: Desir Arman
dialogue.line: (My magic aptitude is low. In my past life, I barely scraped by into Beta Class. But now... I have ten years of battle experience and knowledge.)

dialogue.speaker: Instructor
dialogue.line: For the first part, we will assess your understanding of basic magic theory. Please answer the questions on your slate.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RUSTLE RUSTLE

dialogue.speaker: Student A
dialogue.line: Ugh, 'Principles of Mana Circulation'? This is so hard!

dialogue.speaker: Student B
dialogue.line: I can't even remember the third principle of elemental affinity...

dialogue.speaker: Desir Arman
dialogue.line: (These questions are child's play. They're based on the standard curriculum, which I've seen countless times in the Labyrinth's archives.)

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SCRIBBLE SCRIBBLE

dialogue.speaker: Desir Arman
dialogue.line: (The true challenge isn't just knowing the answers, but applying them. And I've applied them in life-or-death situations for a decade.)

dialogue.speaker: Instructor
dialogue.line: Time's up! Please submit your slates.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Desir submitted his slate, a faint smirk playing on his lips. His answers were concise, precise, and utterly correct.

dialogue.speaker: Instructor
dialogue.line: Next, a practical assessment. Form a simple fire orb. We'll measure mana output and stability.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FWOOSH FWOOSH

dialogue.speaker: Student C
dialogue.line: Mine's so small...

dialogue.speaker: Student D
dialogue.line: Mine just fizzled out!

dialogue.speaker: Desir Arman
dialogue.line: (My raw mana capacity is still low, but my control... it's on a different level.)

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRACKLE

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A perfectly spherical, stable fire orb materialized in Desir's palm, glowing with a steady intensity that belied his young appearance.

dialogue.speaker: Instructor
dialogue.line: Impressive... for a first-year.

dialogue.speaker: Desir Arman
dialogue.line: (This is just the beginning. I need to get into Alpha Class. I need to find them. Romantica, Pram, Azest... and more.)

dialogue.speaker: Desir Arman
dialogue.line: (I'll gather the strongest, train them, and prepare them for the true war to come. This time, we will win.)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: With a renewed sense of purpose, Desir Arman stepped forward, ready to rewrite the future.

summary: Desir Arman awakens in his past self, ten years before the world's destruction by the Shadow Labyrinth. Armed with future knowledge, he resolves to change history, starting with excelling at Hebrion Academy's entrance exam.
